creator: kaoru@kaisei.org
text:
At Fri, 1 Jan 2010 09:53:31 GMT,
lwhsu@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: [NEW PORT] japanese/asterisk16-sounds: Japanese sound files for Asterisk 1.6
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: lwhsu
> State-Changed-When: Fri Jan 1 09:53:31 UTC 2010
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Does not build on 8:
> http://people.freebsd.org/~lwhsu/asterisk16-addons-1.6.1.0.log  Could
> you dix this?  Thanks!

It seems fixed by upsteam.
 <https://issues.asterisk.org/view.php?id=14343>
 <https://issues.asterisk.org/view.php?id=14392>

BTW, japanese/asterisk16-sounds is independent of net/asterisk16-addons.
Only RUN_DEPENDS = net/asterisk16.
